name: Michael Herrera
summary: Former U.S. Marine who publicly alleged that he observed a large advanced craft and unidentified personnel during a 2009 humanitarian deployment in Indonesia.
profileStatus: Former Marine and firsthand craft-encounter claimant
profileSummary: Former U.S. Marine who publicly alleged that he observed a large advanced craft and unidentified personnel during a 2009 humanitarian deployment in Indonesia.
inclusionNote: Included because he has made named public statements and reported providing information through whistleblower channels. Major details of the account remain unverified and have been publicly disputed.

primarySourceLinks.label: Long-form interview on the Indonesia account
Joint podcast episode with Jonathan Weygandt
